summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Enhanced Admin and Sponsor features. All 24 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verification confirmed: Become a Sponsor form, Admin Inquiries tab, Challenge active toggles, and validation messages all working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/sponsor-inquiries creates with minimal required fields
GET /api/challenges/all returns all challenges including inactive (admin)
PUT /api/challenges/{id} rejects duplicate name on update (400)
Landing page 'Become a Sponsor' form displays correctly
Landing page sponsor form submits successfully with success message
Admin Inquiries tab shows badge count for new inquiries
Admin Inquiries tab displays all inquiry details (company, contact, email, phone, message)
Admin status dropdown shows all 4 options (New, Contacted, Confirmed, Declined)
Admin Challenges tab shows active toggle switches for each challenge
Admin Challenge form shows 'Description (50-2000 characters)' label with counter
Admin Challenge form shows Active toggle (default checked)
seed_data_creation: Test inquiries created via API and UI: TEST_Company_Public, TEST_MinimalCorp, Test Company UI, Test Corp

mocked_features.route_map_uploads: Files saved to /app/backend/uploads/ - functional but not served in test environment

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sponsor Inquiries feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/sponsor-inquiries (public), GET/PUT status/DELETE (admin only). Status options: new, contacted, confirmed, declined. Challenge validation: unique names, 50-2000 char descriptions. Route map uploads work at POST /api/challenges/{id}/route-map and /route-map-markers. Admin UI has Inquiries tab with badge count for new inquiries. Challenge form shows validation hints and active toggle.
